title: LOL Surprise Large Art Set | Colouring Set | Colouring Posters | Stickers Sheet | Girls Gifts | Stationary Set | School Supplies | LOL Stationery Set | Writing Pencils
features: 🎨 Packed with Creativity – Includes 10 A4 coloring posters, A6 doodle pad, A5 sticker sheet, and 3 LOL dolls with reusable dress-up stickers to spark imagination.
📚 Mega Set for Mega Fun – Comes with 4 card stencils, drawing pen, eraser, ruler, sharpener, 12 colored pencils, 8 additional colored pencils, and 3 sheets of colored paper.
🎁 Perfect Gift for Kids – Ideal for birthdays, Christmas, or any special occasion. A must-have for fans of LOL Surprise dolls – boys and girls alike!
🌟 100% Official LOL Surprise Merchandise – Featuring beloved characters like VRQT, Scribbles, and more. Authentic, licensed, and outrageously fun!
🎒 Back to School Ready – Great for school projects, homework, or creative play at home. Compact pack size: 28cm (H) x 33cm (W) x 3cm (D).
